description: Adds sixty authored mineable asteroid contacts, two near each of the thirty authored Universe 1 planets. The resource mixes cover every material currently used by blueprint craft costs and remain tied to the planets plus their existing parent stars through parent_star_id and parent_planet_id metadata.
resource_design_note: Planet type controls resource flavor: rocky and barren worlds carry base ores and silicates, desert worlds add carbon and magnesium, volcanic worlds add sulfides and rare earths, icy and oceanic worlds add water/deuterium/fusion traces, metallic worlds add heavy metals, and crystal worlds add olivine/isotope traces.

u1_bp_resource_asteroid_001_vela_1_1_a.scan_description: Mineable blueprint-material asteroid near Vela 1-1 and Tier 1 Star. Contains iron x240, nickel x57, silicate dust x85.
